nasb.text: “Before I had finished speaking in my heart, behold, Rebekah came out with her jar on her shoulder, and went down to the spring and drew, and I said to her, ‘Please let me drink.’

esv.text: “Before I had finished speaking in my heart, behold, Rebekah came out with her water jar on her shoulder, and she went down to the spring and drew water. I said to her, ‘Please let me drink.’

cnv.text: 我心裡的話還沒有說完，利百加就肩頭扛著水瓶出來了，她下到水泉那裡去打水；我就對她說：‘請給我水喝。’

ccb.text: “我心中的话还没有说完，就看见利百加肩上扛着水罐到井旁打水。我上前向她要水喝，

csbs.text: “我心里的话还没说完，看哪，莉白加就来了！她肩上扛着罐子，下到水泉去打水；我就对她说：‘请你让我喝点水。’
